title: Rubrics, Model Judges, Pairwise Comparison, Human Calibration, and Uncertainty · Code Recall
summary: A delayed engineering review reconstructs rubrics, model judges, pairwise comparison, human calibration, and uncertainty from stakeholder, revision, runtime, model, interaction, call, result, state, approval, evaluation, trace, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for calibrated mixed-method evaluation board after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define observable task-specific criteria, anchors, critical failures, accessibility, safety, evidence, and scoring aggregation before viewing candidate outputs.
Blind model, prompt, provider, and treatment identity; randomize order; use pairwise comparison when it improves judgment reliability.
Measure repeatability, position effects, rubric sensitivity, reference leakage, adversarial manipulation, and judge-version drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Give deterministic safety and policy failures precedence, retain metric disagreement, report uncertainty, and escalate high-impact ambiguous cases. Artifact under review: calibrated mixed-method evaluation board.

options.text: The Eval Precedence Uncertainty record says calibrated mixed-method evaluation board looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Eval Precedence Uncertainty.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient fluent model response, omit stakeholder risk, revision, model and API identity, interaction and call correlation, tool schema and authority, state and resource budgets, approval, changed fixtures, injection, privacy, accessibility, evaluation, recovery, and controlled provider transfer, then accept plausible text as agent proof. This does not satisfy Eval Precedence Uncertainty for calibrated mixed-method evaluation board.
The record names the assumption, applies Eval Precedence Uncertainty, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Record what required effort · Review Eval Precedence Uncertainty
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Eval Precedence Uncertainty: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review agent engineering team handles case 8110 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to use task-specific rubrics, blinded comparisons, judge variance tests, human calibration, disagreement review, and uncertainty escalation; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Give deterministic safety and policy failures precedence, retain metric disagreement, report uncertainty, and escalate high-impact ambiguous cases.

steps.why: Retrieving Eval Precedence Uncertainty through the concrete calibrated mixed-method evaluation board case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Safe AI agents and Python Record what required effort · Review Eval Precedence Uncertainty, keep Eval Precedence Uncertainty connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Give deterministic safety and policy failures precedence, retain metric disagreement, report uncertainty, and escalate high-impact ambiguous cases.
